name: ATI Airtest Technologies Inc.
summary: ATI Airtest Technologies Inc. manufactures and sells air testing equipment and related services in Canada and the United States. It offers sensor products, such as infrared gas sensors for carbon dioxide based ventilation control in buildings; humidity and moisture control that prevent mold problems, improve comfort, and ensure optimal conditions in commercial and industrial environments; gas sensors to control ventilation in parking facilities and other enclosed spaces; heated-thin-film air velocity transmitters and switches to monitor airflow or validate equipment operation; refrigerant gas sensors that identify leaks in air conditioning and refrigeration equipment; and gas sensors for health and safety applications. The company also provides WiFi and EnOcean transmitters; carbon dioxide demand controlled ventilation; HVAC dew point; portables/data logging monitoring; agriculture transmitters; sensor components; industrial dew point, humidity, and temperature measurement; products to measure the temperature of the oil and the moisture content in oil; and calibration services. ATI Airtest Technologies Inc. was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Delta, Canada.
